name: Elizabeth Liones
alt_names: エリザベス・リオネス
description:
Elizabeth Liones is the third adoptive princess of the Kingdom of Liones Originally an alleged survivor of Danafor's destruction, Elizabeth was adopted and raised by the king Bartra Liones. After the Holy Knights rebel, she sets on journey to find Seven Deadly Sins, becoming a waitress for Meliodas' tavern Boar Hat.

~!She is 107th and current incarnation of the Goddess Elizabeth, and the lover of Meliodas, captain of the Seven Deadly Sins. She is the deuteragonist of the series..!~
